parameters.query:
-- ============================================================
-- SÃO RAFAEL - RAG ONLY RESET
-- Trunca apenas a tabela de vetores do RAG.
-- Preserva: orçamentos, clientes, chat history, usuários.
-- ============================================================
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saorafael_documents (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  content text,
  metadata jsonb,
  embedding vector(1536)
);

TRUNCATE TABLE saorafael_documents;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION saorafael_match_documents (
  query_embedding vector(1536),
  match_count int DEFAULT NULL,
  filter jsonb DEFAULT '{}'
) RETURNS TABLE (
  id bigint,
  content text,
  metadata jsonb,
  similarity float
)
LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $$
#variable_conflict use_column
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT id, content, metadata, 1 - (saorafael_documents.embedding <=> query_embedding) AS similarity
  FROM saorafael_documents
  WHERE metadata @> filter
  ORDER BY saorafael_documents.embedding <=> query_embedding
  LIMIT match_count;
END;
$$;

SELECT 'RAG reset completed (orçamentos e clientes preservados)' AS result, NOW() AS executed_at;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, action: $('Extract Params').first().json.action, message: ($('Extract Params').first().json.action === 'rag_only') ? 'RAG resetado e documentos do Drive reindexados com sucesso. Orçamentos, clientes e chat preservados.' : 'Reset completo concluído e documentos do Drive reindexados. Chat limpo, orçamentos e clientes preservados.', reindex_completed: true, executed_at: $('Migration OK?').first().json.executed_at, triggered_by: $('Extract Params').first().json.triggeredBy }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'Migration failed', message: 'Erro ao executar database setup: ' + ($json.error?.message || $json.message || 'Verifique os logs do n8n.') }) }}
